view.posts.dialog.removeFeedDescription: Remove this feed from your saved feeds
view.posts.empty.discoverHint: You can also discover new Custom Feeds to follow.
view.posts.empty.endOfFeed: You've reached the end of your feed! Find some more accounts to follow.
view.posts.empty.feed: This feed is empty! You may need to follow more users or tune your language settings.
view.posts.empty.feedOffline: This feed is no longer online. We are showing {#t0}Discover{/t0} instead.
view.posts.empty.followingFeed: Your following feed is empty! Follow more users to see what's happening.
view.posts.empty.requiresAccount: This content is not viewable without a Bluesky account.
view.posts.error.feedBadResponse: Hmm, the feed server gave a bad response. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.error.feedHighTraffic: This feed is currently receiving high traffic and is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
view.posts.error.feedMisconfigured: Hmm, the feed server appears to be misconfigured. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.error.feedNotFound: Hmm, we're having trouble finding this feed. It may have been deleted.
view.posts.error.feedOffline: Hmm, the feed server appears to be offline. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.error.feedServerRequest: Hmm, some kind of issue occurred when contacting the feed server. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.error.removeFeed: There was an issue removing this feed. Please check your internet connection and try again.
view.posts.feedback.replacedWithDiscover: The feed has been replaced with Discover.
view.posts.feedback.thanks: Thank you for your feedback! It has been sent to the feed operator.
